title: athanasia viridis
intro: Athanasia viridis, also known as Mountain Everlasting, is a flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion, reduce inflammation, and act as a diuretic. The health benefits of Athanasia viridis include its potential to alleviate symptoms of digestive disorders, such as constipation and bloating, as well as its antioxidant properties, which can help protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. Athanasia viridis can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, allowing individuals to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
